cases.name: 1. legacy user with no PlatformAdmin returns false (Phase 3.9 supersedes legacy signal)
2. PlatformAdmin row user (non-system agency) returns platform admin
3. user with both signals returns platform admin
4. user with neither signal returns false
6. existing PlatformAdmin row is not mutated by isPlatformAdmin()
7. Agency row is not mutated by isPlatformAdmin() (column dropped in Phase 3.9; row presence preserved)
11. PlatformAuditLog write is not attempted (table absent, no error raised)
9. PLATFORM_ADMIN_DUAL_READ_ENABLED flag inert under Phase 3.9 (PlatformAdmin sole authority)
10. source-level inventory captures remaining Agency.isSystem references
13. Phase 3.4 employee unique harness wiring intact

inventory.text: if (role.isSystem && dto.name && dto.name !== role.name) throw new BadRequestException('Cannot rename system roles');
if (role.isSystem) throw new BadRequestException('Cannot delete system roles');
agency: user.agency ? { id: user.agency.id, name: user.agency.name, isSystem: await this.platformAdminAccess.isPlatformAdmin(user.id) } : null,
if ('isSystem' in (dto as any)) delete (dto as any).isSystem;
if ('isSystem' in (dto as any)) delete (dto as any).isSystem;
